deploymentScope.scopeStatement: Staging rehearsal using synthetic subjects, resources, queues, audit windows, and SIEM delivery receipts.

classification.approvalStatement: This record proves the exercise workflow and retained evidence shape only; it is not assessor-approved production operating evidence.

rules: Use synthetic tenant, subject, resource, queue, and SIEM identifiers.
Record role labels instead of named people.
Reference evidence files instead of embedding provider payloads.
Keep command output summaries bounded to status, counts, and hashes.

scenarios.title: Classify degraded audit forwarding and open incident evidence
observations: Incident commander classified the rehearsal as high severity because SIEM delivery was unavailable.
Authorization remained fail closed while the audit-forwarder replay step was pending.

scenarios.title: Review synthetic emergency access and expiry evidence
observations: Temporary role binding used a synthetic actor and expired inside the exercise window.
Post-action review captured residual-risk disposition without storing identity payloads.

scenarios.title: Restore graph, audit, and job evidence from synthetic backup receipts
commands: rebac evidence export --framework nist-800-53 --controls CP-4,AU-6 --format json
observations: Graph, audit, and job restore receipts stayed inside documented RTO and RPO targets.
Restore proof used the synthetic production persistence evidence contract rather than live stores.

scenarios.title: Exercise read-only fallback and protected-action freeze
observations: Normal grant creation stayed paused while read-only fallback was active.
Operator recovery criteria required readiness, queue, audit, and connector evidence before thawing.

scenarios.title: Reserve emergency revocation ahead of lower-priority queue work
observations: Emergency revocation remained reservable while normal discovery work was degraded.
Synthetic provider readback confirmed residual access was removed before recovery sign-off.

scenarios.title: Replay retained audit window after synthetic SIEM delivery failure
observations: Replay evidence linked the failed delivery, signed audit window, and replay receipt.
The rehearsal retained counts and payload hashes without embedding SIEM payload bodies.

scenarios.title: Close review with owner, residual gaps, and retained validation proof
commands: rebac evidence export --framework nist-800-53 --controls AC-2,AU-6,CP-4,IR-4 --format json
observations: Review distinguished rehearsed proof from assessor-approved production operations.
No residual POA&M item was opened for the synthetic exercise.

gaps: Replace this rehearsed proof with deployment-specific assessor-reviewed operations evidence before claiming production exercise completion.
